title: iris linifoliiformis
intro: Iris linifoliiformis, also known as the thread-leaved iris, is a flowering plant species within the iris family (Iridaceae). Traditionally, the rhizome of Iris linifoliiformis has been used in medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Iris linifoliiformis is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, which can be prepared by boiling the rhizome in water or steeping it in hot water to make a medicinal tea.
